body: Hannah, thanks for the follow-up on the DataStream roadmap — I've been sitting with a few of the points you raised and wanted to share some initial reactions before our call later this week. The shift toward real-time inference pipelines makes a lot of sense to me given where the market is heading, and I think it actually opens up a stronger story for the [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) portfolio thesis around AI infrastructure at the edge. That said, I'd love to dig into the compute cost assumptions a bit more, because the margin profile at scale is where I've been getting questions from my LPs lately. Would it be possible to have your team pull together a rough unit economics breakdown ahead of Thursday? Even a back-of-envelope version would help me come prepared with something concrete rather than just high-level reactions. Looking forward to it.
